name: applycairn
description: A private Career Memory for evidence-backed reviews, promotions, compensation cases, role justification, and job search

interface.shortDescription: Keep a private, evidence-backed memory of your career.
interface.longDescription: Capture work as it happens, preserve approved local evidence, maintain a canonical accomplishment record, prepare reviews and promotion cases, and build truthful job applications from the same user-owned Career Memory.
defaultPrompt: Log a win from this week.
Prepare evidence for my performance review.
